_README: Hand-curated, SOURCE-CITED facts that GitHub does not expose. Two roles: (1) '_anchors' lists ecosystem repos force-included by scripts/ecosystem.py and flagged ecosystem=true (NEVER given a fake star boost) — each with a short honest role/note; (2) top-level 'owner/repo' keys carry source-cited facts merged by merge_curated() only if present here. Keep TRUE: every claim independently checkable. Keys beginning with '_' (except _anchors) are ignored by the loader.

AxonOS-org/axonos-kernel.note: Hard real-time scheduling core of the AxonOS neural operating system.

AxonOS-org/axonos-protocol.note: Wire protocol and reference implementation for neural device meshing.

AxonOS-org/axonos-consent.note: MMP Consent Extension: consent enforced at the connection layer.

AxonOS-org/axonos-standard.note: The AxonOS standard, conformance tiers and test vectors.

AxonOS-org/axonos-signal-pipeline.note: no_std deterministic EEG / neural signal processing pipeline.

AxonOS-BCI/axonos-community-radar.note: The instrument you are looking at: a live map of the open BCI field.

AxonOS-org/axonos-kernel.curated_note: Open-source real-time neural OS for brain-computer interfaces.
